use_cases: Display horizontally scrollable content in a contained area with native scroll behavior
Wrap lists of items, cards, or media that need horizontal overflow navigation
Provide accessible horizontal scrolling with customizable scrollbar styling via Radix UI
Create scrollable carousels or horizontal galleries with consistent scroll behavior
Enable side-scrolling navigation for navigation menus or toolbars
ai_summary: A minimal horizontal scroll area wrapper component built on Radix UI's ScrollArea primitive. It provides a flexible container with horizontal scrollbar functionality for displaying overflow content like lists, cards, or media in a controlled scrolling region. Designed for generic use across any industry requiring horizontal content display.
